name: cold_misses
description: Unique prompts with no shared prefix. Every request is a cache miss. Used as a latency baseline.
system_prompt: You are an expert assistant in distributed systems and storage. Answer concisely and technically.
prompts: Explain concept 0: B-tree vs LSM-tree trade-offs
Explain concept 2: Write-ahead logging in SQLite
Explain concept 4: Extent-based allocation in ext4
Explain concept 6: Bloom filters in RocksDB
Explain concept 9: The CAP theorem revisited
